Id1.text: Bakewell pudding was created in 1820 at the Rutland Arms, Bakewell and has ground almond, jam, butter and eggs as main ingredients.

Id2.text: The main ingredients of Bakewell pudding, which was invented in Rutland Arms, Bakewell, in 1820, are ground almond, jam, butter and eggs.
